title: anthephora cenchroides var. glabra
intro: Anthephora cenchroides var. glabra, also known as smooth anthephora, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Anthephora cenchroides var. glabra include reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant are often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
